name: Squall Line
flavorHeadline: Habanero-forward with tropical mango counter, complex heat
heatDescriptor: The storm is here — tropical sweetness chased by real heat
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Squall Line EF-3 hot sauce with a deep red label
productStory: A sudden, violent shift in the atmosphere. Squall Line delivers a rapid, striking wave of pure habanero heat, followed immediately by the golden, tropical reprieve of ripe mango. It is a calculated, high-contrast collision of extreme weather and deep coastal flavor.
